output.adopted_states_note: NAIC AI Model Bulletin adopted or substantially adopted by 24+ states as of mid-2026. 12-state market-conduct exam pilot ran Jan-Sep 2026 (verify current adoption status with NAIC and state regulator before relying on this count).
do_now: All dimensions at Partially Implemented or above — focus on documentation and exam-evidence preparation.
output.exam_pilot_note: 12-state market-conduct exam pilot ran Jan-Sep 2026 per NAIC. Verify current exam schedule with your state regulator.
output.regulatory_basis: NAIC AI Model Bulletin (Aug 2020, rev. 2023); NAIC AI Systems (AIS) Evaluation Tool (2024 edition); NAIC Market Regulation Handbook (2024)
output.table_source: NAIC AI Model Bulletin (adopted Aug 2020, updated 2023); NAIC AI Systems Evaluation Tool (2024 ed., naic.org)
